input.question: Which 10 courses have the highest average reported workload?

payload.question: Which 10 courses have the highest average reported workload?

output.sql:
WITH avg_workload_per_course AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.name AS course_name,
    ROUND(AVG(r.reported_workload), 2) AS avg_workload,
    COUNT(r.reported_workload) AS report_count
  FROM courses c
  JOIN reviews r ON c.id = r.course_id
  WHERE r.reported_workload IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY c.id, c.name
)
SELECT course_id, course_name, avg_workload, report_count
FROM avg_workload_per_course
ORDER BY avg_workload DESC
LIMIT 10;

visualization.title: Top 10 courses by average reported workload

payload.sql:
WITH avg_workload_per_course AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS course_id,
    c.name AS course_name,
    ROUND(AVG(r.reported_workload), 2) AS avg_workload,
    COUNT(r.reported_workload) AS report_count
  FROM courses c
  JOIN reviews r ON c.id = r.course_id
  WHERE r.reported_workload IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY c.id, c.name
)
SELECT course_id, course_name, avg_workload, report_count
FROM avg_workload_per_course
ORDER BY avg_workload DESC
LIMIT 10;
